name: skill_guide
description: Read skill documentation (SKILL.md) on demand. Lets Aria learn how to use any skill before calling its tools.
author: Aria Team

tools.name: skill_guide__read
tools.description: Read a skill's SKILL.md documentation. Call this BEFORE using an unfamiliar skill to understand its tools, parameters, and usage patterns. Returns the full markdown guide.

tools.name: skill_guide__list
tools.description: List all available skills with their layer, status, and one-line description. Use this to discover what capabilities are available.
